Referral.shareText: Your business auto-answers repetitive questions. Try it:

Landing.metaTitle: Auto-reply to your Instagram & Facebook DMs with AI | Minibox
Landing.metaDescription: Minibox connects AI to your Instagram and Facebook to answer customer DMs instantly, 24/7. No code, 2 clicks. Start free.
Landing.metaKeywords: instagram auto reply, automatically reply instagram messages, instagram chatbot, bot to reply instagram dm, automate instagram replies business, ai to answer messages, facebook messenger auto reply, manychat alternative
Landing.badge: AI for small businesses · Instagram + Facebook
Landing.heroH1: Auto-reply to your Instagram & Facebook DMs, powered by AI
Landing.heroSub: Every time you post a price you get the same messages: “how much is it?”, “do you ship?”. Minibox answers them for you instantly, 24/7. Connect in 2 clicks, no technical skills needed.
Landing.heroNote: Free to start. No card required.
Landing.pain1: You post a promo and get “how much?” 40 times. You type the same answer all day long.
Landing.pain2: People message you at night or when you’re busy, you don’t reply in time and lose the sale.
Landing.pain3: You tried bots, but building reply trees is a pain and they sound robotic.
Landing.stepsSub: From zero to replying on its own, in minutes. No coding.
Landing.step1Desc: Log in with Instagram or Facebook in 2 clicks. Done, nothing to install.
Landing.step2Desc: It reads your profile and drafts your FAQs automatically. You review and tweak them by chatting.
Landing.step3Desc: Enable auto-replies and Minibox answers your DMs for you, instantly.
Landing.featuresTitle: Everything to never miss a sale
Landing.feature1Desc: Your customers get an answer the moment they write, even on Sunday at 3am.
Landing.feature2Desc: It understands natural language and replies with your prices, shipping and stock. No rigid menus.
Landing.feature3Desc: When unsure, it pings you or hands over the conversation. It never makes things up.
Landing.feature4Desc: Handle DMs from both networks in one place, in your language.
Landing.forWhoSub: Clothing shops, food, services, e-commerce, freelancers… If you sell on Instagram or Facebook and you’re tired of typing the same replies, Minibox is for you.
Landing.faq1Q: Do I need to know how to code?
Landing.faq1A: No. You connect your account in 2 clicks and the AI sets itself up from your profile. Nothing to program.
Landing.faq2A: You start free: the first replies cost nothing and we don’t ask for a card. Then you pick a plan if it’s worth it.
Landing.faq3Q: Does it reply with my prices and info?
Landing.faq3A: Yes. The AI learns your business and you edit the answers. It replies with your prices, shipping and terms.
Landing.faq4Q: What if the AI doesn’t know something?
Landing.faq4A: It doesn’t make things up. When unsure it pings you or hands the conversation over to you. Precision over volume.
Landing.faq5Q: Does it work with Instagram and Facebook?
Landing.faq5A: Yes, with direct messages on both. WhatsApp is coming soon.
Landing.faq6A: Yes. Access tokens are stored encrypted, each account is isolated, and you can request deletion of your data anytime.
Landing.finalCtaSub: Connect your Instagram or Facebook and let the AI reply for you. No card, no hassle.
